body: IA audit done. WordPress has 23 live pages, 11 need redirects. Shared the full map in the design folder.
Got the file. Will structure the CMS collections around these slugs. Closing WEB-101.
Staff Picks collection live in Webflow staging. Fields: title, author, language, cover_image, lucia_note, isbn. Check and confirm the field names are right.
Looks good. Add a published_date field to Staff Picks - I rotate them seasonally. Authors and Events collections approved.
Hero v1 in Figma review link. Dark linen background with the shop window photo Maja shot in January. Text overlay in Libre Baskerville.
The photo is right. The headline font size is too large on mobile - test at 375px. Otherwise I like where this is going.
Mobile size fixed, pushed to staging. Closing.
Stripe test keys wired into Webflow. Gift card 200 / 500 / 1000 kr Payment Links created. Test checkout working in staging with SEK currency.
Tested with a 200 kr gift card payment. Stripe dashboard shows correct amount in SEK. Webhook fires - got the confirmation email at orders@weaverandbook.se. Approve.
Hamburger z-index was 10, banner was 20. Bumped header to z-index 30. Tested on iPhone 15 Safari and Chrome Android - no overlap now.
Confirmed on my iPhone 15. Good. Closing.
Reproduced. The click handler fires onChange but iOS Safari batches the state update. Switching to controlled input with explicit setState should fix it.
Please test the fix before mid-March - I want this closed before the launch sprint starts in October.
Footer live in staging. Mailchimp embed pulls in the weaverbook list. Needs Lucia to test the signup form and confirm the Instagram link is @weaverbook.
Signup form works - I got the test email from Mailchimp. Instagram link is correct. One change: add the shop landline +46 18 13 22 40 to the footer.
Phone number added. Ready for final review.
Typeform embed dropped in. Lending Shelf copy stub added, waiting on Lucia's draft.
I'll have the copy ready by mid-March. The form looks right - make sure the submit button colour matches the linen palette.
All 15 titles imported. lucia_note field is displaying correctly with the Libre Baskerville italic style. Closing WEB-111.
Meta titles and descriptions added to all 23 CMS collection pages. Used Swedish primary keywords for Events and Staff Picks, English secondary. Closing.
